# Generated by cguess.py
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.10)
project(gedi CXX)

set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 20)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)

set(CURSES_NEED_WIDE TRUE) # Request wide-character Curses
find_package(Curses REQUIRED)

if(CURSES_FOUND)
    include_directories(${CURSES_INCLUDE_DIRS})
    add_executable(${PROJECT_NAME}
        tedit.cpp
        Renderer.cpp
        TextEditor.cpp
        SyntaxHighlighter.cpp
        FileBrowser.cpp
        ConfigManager.cpp
        BuildSystem.cpp
        SearchEngine.cpp
        HelpProvider.cpp
        BufferManager.cpp
        ComboBox.cpp
        TabControl.cpp
        KeyBindings.cpp
        MessageDialog.cpp
        QuestionDialog.cpp
        SettingsDialog.cpp
        ReplaceDialog.cpp
        GoToLineDialog.cpp
        CompileOptionsDialog.cpp
        BuildOutputDialog.cpp
        HelpDialog.cpp
        utils.cpp

        EditorBuffer.h
        Renderer.h
        TextEditor.h
        SyntaxHighlighter.h
        FileBrowser.h
        ConfigManager.h
        BuildSystem.h
        SearchEngine.h
        HelpProvider.h
        BufferManager.h
        utils.h
        EditorBuffer.cpp
        CyclicEnum.h
    )
    target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} ${CURSES_LIBRARIES})
else()
    message(FATAL_ERROR "Curses library (with wide character support) not found. Please install ncurses-devel or equivalent.")
endif()

install(TARGETS ${PROJECT_NAME} DESTINATION bin)

# Install the configs, help file and python script to a shared data directory
install(
    FILES
        help.hlp
        colors.json
        config.json
    DESTINATION
        share/gedi
)

install(
    FILES
        cguess.py
    DESTINATION
        lib/python3/dist-packages/${PROJECT_NAME}
)
